source: Codex read-only connector checks: GitHub repository get/search, Neon project list/search, Cloudflare Workers/Pages list

github.note: GitHub app installation was observed. A direct get for jinbizman-boop/salary-hijacking-platform returned 404, and repository search for salary-hijacking-platform under jinbizman-boop returned no repositories. The Salary Hijacking release must use a newly created repository. Existing repositories, including Retro Games and RETRO-DB, must not be modified or used as release targets. Repository-level access for the new salary-hijacking-platform repository was not proven in this turn.

cloudflare.note: Cloudflare connector account access was observed. The account returned zero Workers and one Pages project named retro-db, which is unrelated and must not be used for Salary Hijacking. No matching Salary Hijacking admin Pages project was observed.

neon.note: Neon organization access was observed. The listed project is Retro Games, and read-only searches for salary and hijacking returned no matching projects. Existing Retro Games database resources must not be used for Salary Hijacking.
